positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial journey scene. A vibrant, glowing crescent moon floats above rolling, stylized pastel mountains and stylized constellations (featuring simple geometric patterns like triangles and circles). The primary subject is a single, elegant, silhouetted figure of a cosmic traveler or astronaut looking towards the moon. The composition is central and balanced, designed for apparel printing, featuring clean lines and strong contrast between the black silhouette and the glowing cosmic background. Color palette: deep indigo, lavender, soft teal, accented by brilliant gold and pearl white glowing light. Style: Mid-century modern illustration mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. High contrast, vector art quality, flat graphic design, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, low detail, realistic, photo, photorealism
